case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. ADRIAN CANCHOLA

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED TO MAY 10, 2017 AT 1:30 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT ADRIAN CANCHOLA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ADRIAN CANCHOLA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CANCHOLA, ADRIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
